text.tspan: Miro Board Kit - Architecture, Database, Requirements, Roadmap
Internal operating system for executives and producers
Centralize projects, scripts, documents, spreadsheets, contacts, submissions,
Store scripts as both original PDFs and parsed searchable text
Internal-only launch; AI canvas comes after the core database is stable
Legal audit trail for passed submissions?
Which contacts are visible to Artists?
Search document contents or metadata only?
Executives can see all active projects and current statuses
Producers can upload scripts, docs, and spreadsheets against projects
Scripts are stored as PDFs and parsed searchable text
Contacts can be linked to projects with relationship status
Every important project status change has an audit trail
Global search can find projects, scripts, contacts, and documents
